Keyboard
Note This wallet seems to use a non-standard character in its recovery phrase and/or a passphrase. If you do not see a balance or transactions please read below for details.\n\nCLICK TO GET MORE INFO This is a non-standard wallet. Please migrate to a standard wallet to avoid risk of fund loss. \n\nCLICK TO GET MORE INFO
Unchain Assets Don\'t lock yourself in and don\'t let others do that to you. Go Borderless Bypass conditional barriers and access markets globally. Stay Private Do not leak your private and financial data to the world.
I Understand
Advanced Recovery Phrase Word List Passphrase Password Confirm %s words (recommended) %s words Passphrase cannot be empty Please use only supported symbols: A-Z a-z 0-9 \' " ` & / ? ! : ; . , ~ * $ = + - [ ](){} <> \ _ # @ | % Passphrase confirmation does not match Passphrases provide an additional layer of security for wallets.When restoring a wallet protected by a passphrase, the user must provide both the recovery phrase and the passphrase.\n\nPassphrases also allow users to create multiple independent multi-coin wallets from the same mnemonic, simply by using different passphrases. Enter the passphrase
English Japanese Korean Spanish Chinese (Simplified) Chinese (Traditional) French Italian Czech Portuguese
Rate this App Enjoying SafeWallet? Please take a moment to rate this app
Rate It Not now
Advanced Enter your wallet recovery phrase (aka mnemonic) which consists of 12, 15, 18, 21 or 24 words and may include additional alphanumeric password. Incorrect Key Wrong words count. It must be between 12 or 24 words. You entered: %d Passphrase cannot be empty Password cannot be empty Invalid Checksum Enter the passphrase you used when creating this recovery phrase. Restoring an existing wallet with a new passphrase will generate a brand new wallet. Choose Blockchains Import By Import By Recovery Phrase Private Key Enter EVM Private Key, BIP32 Root Key, Stellar Secret Key or Account Extended Private Key Enter Recovery Phrase Non-Standard Import This page provides a special wallet restore mechanism to SafeWallet users who have a non-standard wallet. Such wallets might have been created in SafeWallet version 0.27 - 0.28 using a non-English recovery phrase and/or a special character in the wallet passphrase (i.e. diacritic symbol).\n\nIf you\'re an affected user then your wallet balance will be shown 0 after restoring such wallet in version 0.29 or above. This page will enable you to restore access to your non-standard wallet. Once restored you\'re recommended to create a new wallet (which will be standard compliant) and move funds there.
(recommended)
Invalid Key
Choose Coins
All
Birthday Height Invalid Birthday Height Enter wallet\'s birthday height for faster synchronization. 000000000 (optional) You can change the block height or select an approximate date to rescan your transaction history. Your wallet will be restored from a default starting point. You can change the block height or select an approximate wallet creation date. Block Date: Rescan Restore as New New Wallet Doesn\'t have any transactions Existing Wallet Has transactions The initial synchronization with the blockchain can consume a lot of internet traffic.
MCap Vol Price Markets Search All RECENT POPULAR Highest Cap Lowest Cap Highest Volume Lowest Volume Highest Price Lowest Price Sort by Filter by BTC Dominance See All Powered By CoinGeko API News Coins Platforms Pairs Sectors Favorites Earn Your favorites are empty. Top Coins Signals Volume Market Cap TVL Below signals are based on the Bollinger Bands and RSI technical price indicators over approx. the last 30 days. These signals are algorithmic and can change frequently. High confidence in price increase. Likely price increase in near future. No clear trend, market is in equilibrium. Likely price decrease in near future. High probability of price decrease. Elevated risk level, requires caution. Always remember to apply risk management, and note that this is not financial advice. Turn on Blockchains Native cryptocurrencies on major blockchains. DEXes Decentralized cryptocurrency exchanges. Lending Protocols for lending and borrowing. Privacy Projects working on privacy solutions. Scaling Solutions for faster blockchain transactions. Oracles Connecting real world data to smart contracts. Prediction Markets to bet on events in the future. Yield Aggregators Solutions for earning from idle crypto assets. Stablecoins Crypto tokens pegged 1–1 to fiat currency. Tokenized Bitcoin Crypto tokens pegged 1–1 to Bitcoin price. Exchange Tokens Tokens issued by centralized exchanges. Risk Management Risk assessment, insurance and hedging. Wallets Tokens issued by cryptocurrency wallets. Synthetics Platforms for creating decentralized synthetic assets. Index Funds Assets that pegged in price to a set of tokens. NFT NFT projects. Fundraising Fundraising and token sale platforms. Gaming Crypto projects in gaming and VR sector. Infrastructure Projects building infrastructure solutions. Analytics Token-powered analytics and investment instruments. Storage Decentralized data-storage. Identity Decentralized identity. Yield Tokens Interesting Bearing Tokens. Reserve Currency Asset backed reserve currencies Sync Error Top Coins by market cap rank

Wallet Balance Send Receive %1$s per %2$s until %s Syncing… Searching transactions… Downloading… %s tx Syncing… %s%% Blocks Remaining - %d Balance Sort by Name Price Change You haven\'t added any coins to this wallet. You have no assets to send. Network Format Choose network to get an address to receive. Choose a format for providing an address to receive. Address Format Address Type Choose how you want to receive Zcash. The Cash Address format is preferred for receiving Bitcoin Cash (BCH) due to its improved user experience and compatibility. However, both address formats can be used interchangeably to receive BCH, regardless of the sender\'s address format. The Native SegWit format is preferred in Bitcoin for improved throughput and security. All address formats (Taproot, SegWit, Legacy) can be used interchangeably to receive BTC regardless of the sender\'s address format, enabling seamless transactions across different coin types. Amount Set Amount Memo (Tag) Can\'t recognize This address is the address of the watched account Used Addresses %s addresses change for privacy and security. Below a list of used addresses in this wallet. Receive Addresses Receive Address Change Addresses Search To receive an address you need to activate the token. This is required by the Stellar network. Trustline Subadresses Subaddresses let you use multiple unique addresses within one wallet for convenience and enhanced privacy. Transactions: %s Have you previously owned any %s coins? Yes, I already own No, I don\'t have
Detected Transparent ZEC Transparent amount You have a ZEC balance held in a transparent address. To use it in Unstoppable, it must be shielded for full privacy. Shield Unified Use for personal and private transfers between wallets. Transparent Use for receiving from exchanges or services that don’t support unified addresses.
Send
Enter Address Send %s
Address or Domain
Fee The estimated cost of processing this transaction on the blockchain. Paste Max Advanced TimeLock works only for sending to BIP44 addresses (starting with 1) UTxOs UTxO Expert Mode Manually select UTxO to spend the funds in the balance Replace by Fee This option allows you to resend a stuck transaction by increasing the amount of the fee. Enabled Disabled Available Balance Unsellect All Sellect All
Confirm Send You Send You Receive Mint Burn To Own Method Nonce Memo Duration TimeLock Send Action
Invalid Address Looks like this address doesn’t fit the selected network. Please double-check it. Detected Clear Phishing Check Blacklist Check Sanctions Check Phishing Address Detected! Blacklisted Address Detected! Sanctioned Address Detected! Phishing address detected. Sending here will steal your funds. This address is blacklisted. Funds may be frozen. Sanctioned address detected. Transfer may be blocked. Attention! Secure Send is off. Your transfer may go to a risky address and funds can be lost. Danger! Phishing address detected. Sending here will steal your funds. Safe Address checked. No phishing, blacklist, or sanctions found. It’s safe to use.
Risky Address! You are about to send funds to a high-risk address. Proceeding may result in loss or other security risks. By continuing, you accept the potential dangers. Are you sure you want to proceed?
\u2713 Sent
Camera permission Please grant the camera permission Access to your camera for this app was denied, you can go to settings and allow access Go to Settings
Time locking works only when sending to payment addresses starting with 1... (aka BIP44 addresses) Balance %s Min. amount %s Max. amount %s Sending %s to your own address is not allowed. Please enter a different recipient address. Min. required remainder %s SafeWallet doesn\'t support payments to a transparent address
Available Balance Transaction Speed Memo TimeLock Low High Recommended Custom sat/byte Fee Next Off
1 hour 1 month 1 month 3 months 6 months 9 months 6 months 1 year 3 years 5 years 10 years Sending Unexpected error Something went wrong while sending your transaction. Please try again or copy the error code and contact support. Fee Rate Transaction fees for %1$s (%2$s) paid in %3$s. You need %4$s. Warning! Risk of getting stuck Fee Error Fee Rate is too low. The transaction may get stuck or fail Fee Error The connection to the server has been lost. To proceed, set up the fees manually using the data on the site.
Fee Settings Set Recipient Transaction Nonce Edit Fee Custom nonce for EVM transactions. Controls the order of your transactions and can be used to replace pending ones. Slippage Tolerance The maximum acceptable price deviation for your swap. Beyond this limit the transaction is reverted. Used Nonce An executed transaction with this nonce already exists.
Total Fee Outbound Fee Liquidity Fee Fee The estimated cost of sending given transaction on the network. Gas Limit Transaction complexity is measured in units called \"gas\". It varies depending on the smart contract being executed. The Gas Limit is the estimated maximum gas needed to execute it. The actual gas used will normally be lower. Gas Price (Gwei) The fee for transacting on the network is measured in gas units. Gas Price is the amount a user is willing to spend per unit of gas. When the network is busy, gas prices are high, and low when it\'s idle. An insufficient gas price is often a reason for a transaction to remain pending for an extended period. Base Fee The network protocol determines the base price per gas for each block, called base fee rate. It varies according to the network utilization level from block to block. It can increase or decrease by no more than 12.5% in the next block, making fees more predictable. The value shown here is the current block\'s base fee rate. Max Fee Rate This is the maximum total price per gas the user is willing to pay. It must cover the network\'s base fee rate and max priority fee rate. The value shown here is suggested based on an estimate of the next block\'s base fee rate plus the max priority fee rate chosen by the user. The actual fee rate paid will normally be lower. Setting this lower than the current base fee rate will limit the fee paid, but will result in longer waiting times for the transaction to be confirmed, or even in a stuck transaction. Max Priority Fee Users pay priority fees to incentivize a transaction to be confirmed more quickly. They are sometimes called tips. The max priority fee rate is the maximum additional price per gas the user is willing to pay on top of the base fee rate. The value shown here is suggested based on predicted network conditions. The actual priority fee will normally be lower. Setting this to zero may result in a long waiting time for transaction to be confirmed, as it is placed at the end of the pending transactions queue from all users. Risky The transaction may remain pending for a while or fail entirely. Risky To ensure speedy execution of the transaction the max fee rate (subtracted max. miner tip) should be higher than current base fee rate. If not transaction may remain pending until condition is met. Fee Too High The set transaction fee is higher than necessary for processing this transaction now. Fee Rate (SAT/BYTE) Here is the recommended value for hitting the next 2 blocks When sending a transaction, you must pay a network fee. The busier the network, the higher the fee. \n\nSafeWallet suggests an optimal fee to help your transaction confirm in a reasonable time. You can increase or decrease this value. \n\nSetting the fee too low may cause your transaction to stay pending for a long time or even be rejected. For faster confirmation, use a higher fee.
Transaction Speed Both Bitcoin and Ethereum blockchains require users to pay network fees when sending transactions. The fees are higher when a lot of transactions are taking place on the network and lower when the blockchain is less busy. Low Selecting a value from this range may result in a transaction being held as pending for hours, or being rejected. The lower the value, the longer it will take for the transaction to confirm. Recommended Typically, the recommended fee value should be sufficient for a transaction to be processed within minutes or an hour for Bitcoin and within minutes for Ethereum. High For transactions where priority is important, we recommend using the high fee value. It\'s expected to be sufficient for a transaction to be completed within 10 minutes for Bitcoin and within 1-2 minutes for Ethereum. The estimated cost of sending given transaction on the network. (Without excluding Energy, Bandwidth and Activating Fee) Activation Fee This address is not active. Transferring TRX or TRC-10 tokens to an inactive account address will activate the account. Resources Consumed Bandwidth is the unit that measures the size of the transaction bytes stored in the blockchain database. The larger the transaction, the more bandwidth resources will be consumed.\n\nEnergy is the unit that measures the amount of computation required by the TRON virtual machine to perform specific operations on the TRON network.\n\nSince smart contract transactions require computing resources to execute, each smart contract transaction requires to pay for the energy fee.
Cannot transfer TRX to yourself Cannot transfer 0 %s Not Activated TRON Not Activated Transactions will appear after activation TRON requires at least 1 TRX for activation/ Until the wallet is activated, tokens can be received, but balances may not be shown.
Ton Connect New Connection Invalid URL Address Unnamed URL Wallet Choose a Wallet
WalletConnect Status By clicking connect, you allow this app to view your public address. This is important security step to protect your data from potential phishing risks. Unable to connect using this link. Please double-check it and try again. Invalid URL Offline Online Connecting… New Connection Send Transaction Send Sign Request dApp You need to create or import a wallet before you can use WalletConnect Create a backup of your recovery phrase and the associated passphrase. These will allow you to restore your wallet if your phone is lost, stolen, or damaged. Unsupported Blockchain No suitable account No suitable evm kit Unsupported chains: %s Unsupported methods: %s Unsupported events: %s Request not found error You don\’t have any connected dapps Pending Requests Wallet You current wallet type %s does not support WalletConnect Unnamed Paired dApps Delete All Do you want to delete all paired dApss? Delete Delete All Pairs Networks Connect to %s Connected to %s Disconnect %s Scam Protection is deactivated. Domain verification is unavailable. Upgrade to Premium to protect against unverified or phishing websites. This website is not verified and may lead to phishing or loss of funds. Connecting is strongly discouraged. By clicking connect, you allow this app to view your public address. Attention! Danger! Safe Domain Message Checking… Request Failed Value Token Allowance Confirm Transaction %s will be able to move these tokens on your behalf. Something went wrong and the request couldn’t be completed Are you sure you want to remove this connection? You may connect to a fake site and lose funds. Turn me on to stay protected. This dApp is not verified. Connecting may put your funds at risk. I checked it. This dApp is secure to connect.
DApp Connection Requests
Warning Error Insufficient Balance The transaction requires %s for sending The current %s balance is below the amount required to process this transaction, including the transaction fee. Low Fee The set transaction fee amount is insufficient for processing this transaction now. Insufficient Liquidity Likely there is not enough liquidity available to process this trade. Try lowering the amount. Estimation Error Check balance to ensure there is enough %s to cover fee. Or try increasing price slippage amount and try again. Will auto-retry in 3 sec… Consider leaving some %s on balance to be able to pay for future transactions. Unexpected error: %s
Swap AML You Pay You Get 0 (%s%%) %s%% ESTIMATED Select Available balance Allowance Price Available Balance Price Impact Estimated Time Approximate time to receive funds. Swap processing and transaction confirmations may take some time depending on the network and provider. Guaranteed Amount This amount is in the process of validation. As soon as the transaction status is validated you will be able to use these coins. The minimum amount a user is going Slippage Recipient No Providers No Quote Insufficient balance Balance n/a Can\'t swap these tokens This service doesn\'t allow wrapping/unwrapping. Use 1inch instead. High price impact Token Not Enabled Wallet is Syncing Wallet Not Synced Next Select Token In Select Token Out Enter Amount Revoke Revoking... Approve Approving Swapping Quoting Providers Swap Provider (est) (min) (max) Coin Route not found You Pay You Get Confirm Approve Confirm Revoke Confirm Swap This amount is in the process of validation. As soon as the transaction status is validated you will be able to use these coinsThe minimum amount a user is going Too expensive! You’ll lose a big part (-%s%%) of your funds on this swap. Unfavorable price! This swap would result in a major loss (-%s%%) due to very low liquidity. Attention! Protection is off. Bots may interfere with your swap and make you lose money. Protected I’m blocking bots from taking value in your swap. Failed to fetch quote.
Swap Terms Unstoppable aggregates multiple decentralized (DEX) and centralized swap providers to offer competitive rates and broad asset support. Always choose a swap provider that aligns with your requirements. Risk of restrictions I understand that some non-DEX swap providers apply transaction screening (AML). Such providers may reject (and refund) swaps, or, in rare cases (CSAM and terrorism), freeze funds and request KYC data. User responsibility I understand that using non-DEX providers introduces additional risks and that these risks are my responsibility. Unstoppable can not guarantee provider behavior.
Slippage Tolerance Transaction Deadline Recipient Address Apply
Zero Slippage Your transaction is likely to fail. Slippage Tolerance can’t be more than %s%% Invalid address Invalid %s address Your transaction may be frontrun
Activate Token To receive %1$s, you need to activate the token. The Stellar network requires a trustline to be established for each token. Without it, your wallet cannot receive %2$s — the transaction will be rejected and the funds will not be delivered.
You Activate Activating Already Active The token is already active. Insufficient Balance You don\’t have enough XLM balance to activate this token.
Swap Approve You can exchange %s, or you need to revoke and approve the new amount Revoke Revoking Approve You should grant permission to a smart contract to swap given token on your behalf. This permission sets amount that can be used by a smart contract. It doesn\'t affect your balance but requires a small fee to execute approval transaction. \n\nWhile it may be done on demand before each trade, it\'s cheaper to approve higher amount in advance for future trades. You already have an allowance for this amount Spender You Approve You Revoke Allowance Amount
Approve Grant permission to a smart contract for token trading on your behalf, specifying the allowed amount. No impact on your balance, but incurs a small fee for approval.\n\nPre-approving a higher amount for future trades is cost-effective compared to on-demand approvals. Unlimited
Allowance The amount an exchange can spend on a user\’s behalf when executing token swaps. A proceeding transaction setting sufficient allowance is required before an actual swap transaction can take place. Price Impact The expected price deviation from a shown price, typically increases with the swap amount.
Receive %s
Transactions No pending or past transactions yet. Please wait for the sync to finish. Pending Received Change Trust Completed Processing Sent Burned Minted Approved Swapped Failed Transfer Shield Unshield Contract Call External Call Contract Creation Contract Deploy to %s from %s unlimited %s unlimited All Blockchain Coin Contacts All Blockchains All Coins All Contacts Choose Coin Choose Blockchain Received Sent Swaps Approvals Unknown Transaction Operation Type Change Trust Create Account Ton Transaction Stellar Transaction Transaction can not be parsed Multiple Filter Hide suspicious tx Hides small-value incoming transfers (e.g. USDT below $1.5). These transactions are often used for phishing and address-poisoning attacks. Filtering by contacts works on the following blockchains: Ethereum, BNB Smart Chain, Polygon, Avalanche, Gnosis, Fantom, Arbitrum, Optimism, Tron, Ton and ZCash. Below are the suitable contacts You don\'t have any suitable contacts
Transaction Info Status Date ID Service Raw Transaction Contact Name To From Spender Memo Locked until %s Unlocked at %s Recipient Historical Rate Fee Fee (est.) The transaction is sent to own address Double Spend Risk! View on %s Price You Got You Sent Received Minted Sent Approved Speed Up Tx Secret Key This transaction is suspicious and can be a scam.\nPlease do not copy any addresses from this transaction. This action will attempt to invalidate the previous transaction by resending it with a higher fee.
Pending Processing Completed Failed The transaction has not been confirmed on the blockchain yet. Transactions sent with a recommended or higher fee setting are generally processed within a few minutes. Transactions sent with a low fee may remain pending for a few hours or even days, and can even be rejected. Note that status of an individual transaction in SafeWallet interface typically updated with a short delay. The transaction has been already included in the blockchain but has not reached permanent finality. At this point, it\'s safe to consider the transaction as completed for smaller payments. For larger payments, it\'s recommended to wait until the transaction status changes to completed. Transaction is completed and considered permanent and irreversible.
All Incoming Outgoing
The transaction did not get processed and no value transfer took place. Depending on the fail reason, some failed transactions may consume transaction fees. Transactions that were replaced or cancelled by another transaction do not consume transaction fees and will also appear sa failed. The SafeWallet app is unable to show the reason for failed transactions, but users are able to look it up themselves on a public block explorer i.e. etherscan.io.
Speed Up Resend Cancel Cancel Transaction
Transaction already in block
Replaced Transactions Fee (Sat) Fee Too Low RBF not enabled Unable to replace
TimeLock The sender sent these funds with a spending lock that will expire on %s.\n\nNo worries, the received Bitcoins are already yours, but until the lock period expires you can not spend them on the Bitcoin network. The sender sent these funds with a spending lock that will expire on the shown date.\n\nNo worries, the received Bitcoins are already yours, but until the lock period expires you can not spend them on the Bitcoin network.
Locked Balance The Stellar network locks 1 XLM to activate the wallet and 0.5 XLM as a reserve for each token activated in your wallet. Wallet activation
Broadcast The transaction holding this amount is broadcasted but not yet accepted by the network.
Processing amount Transactions with this amount still syncing. And when they are confirmed, these tokens will be available for spending
Double Spend Double Spend Risk! There is another transaction on the blockchain that is trying to spend inputs used in this transaction. Only one transaction will be accepted by the network This Tx Conflicting Tx
Academy
Page not found
Base Currency OTHER Disclaimer The exchange rate data is provided by a third party service - Coingecko.com.\n\nThe Unstoppable wallet app doesn\'t guarantee these values are always correct and matches market data. The chance for inconsistency is higher if you select any base currency other than %s. I Understand
Settings Security Base Currency Language Theme Security Terms Privacy Tell Friends SafeWallet %s decentralized app SAFE Foundation & Horizontal systems FAQ
App Status WalletConnect Rate Us Launch Screen Choose which screen the app opens on by default. Appearance Subscription Auto-Lock Telegram Twitter Join Unstoppables Support Priority Support
Donate Donate %s Addresses Donation Addresses
Immediate 1 minute 5 minutes 15 minutes 30 minutes 1 hour
Address Checker Recipient Check Scans the recipient address for security risks prior to sending. Check Address on %s Sanctions Check %s Blacklist Check Chainalysis.com Chainalysis is a blockchain analysis platform that provides tools for tracking, investigating, and assessing the risk of cryptocurrency addresses. It helps identify addresses associated with sanctions, fraud, and other illicit activities. Hashdit.io HashDit is a security platform that allows users to check wallet addresses for risks such as sanctions and blacklist status. It helps users avoid interacting with potentially malicious or blocked addresses. Allows you to verify whether a wallet address is blacklisted by Tether (USDT). If an address is blacklisted, any USDT tokens associated with it may be frozen, making them inaccessible and non-transferable. This check helps users avoid interacting with high-risk or restricted addresses. Enables you to check if a wallet address is blacklisted by the USDC issuer (Circle). Addresses on the blacklist may have their USDC holdings frozen due to compliance, fraud, or regulatory reasons. Using this check reduces the risk of sending funds to blocked or suspicious wallets. Provides a way to verify if a wallet address is blacklisted by PYUSD, issued by PayPal. Funds held at blacklisted addresses may be frozen and unusable, typically due to legal or security concerns. This tool helps ensure safer and compliant transactions with PYUSD. The address you entered appears to be invalid. Please double-check for typos or formatting issues and try again.
Premium Upgrade your experience with Premium features! Try for FREE MiniApp Pass tests, complete tasks, and earn tokens! Be part of the future of private finance Support the Project!
Support the Unstoppable Movement Be part of the future of private finance “Unstoppable Wallet has been free, ad-free, and open-source from day one — and it will stay that way.” By joining the Unstoppable movement, you stand for open and private finance: The Unstoppable Wallet Team Your support isn’t just about unlocking features — it’s a commitment to privacy, freedom, and open access for all. It helps keep the wallet ad-free, secure, and truly independent — for you and for hundreds of thousands who rely on it worldwide. Exclusively on F-Droid Unstoppable Wallet gives you advanced features — with no subscription, no limits: Full analytics and data about tokens Privacy Mode & Duress Mode Signals for confident trading Address blacklist checker Advanced asset search and filters Priority access to support Every bit of support matters. By supporting Unstoppable Wallet, you help us grow, improve, and stay independent.
Active Get Premium Restore Purchase Manage Subscription
%s days
Premium (Free for F-Droid)
Premium Enjoy the first %s FREE. You can cancel your Play Store subscription at any time. Get %s FREE Subscribe Try for FREE Upgrade Thank you for your \nsubscription! Go to App Upgrade your experience with Premium features! Enjoy the full power of the app. Select Subscription One purchase unlocks all Premium features.
Token Insights Advanced Search Trade Signals Robbery Protection Secure Send Scam Protection Priority Support Swap Protection
In-depth analytics and token data Powerful filters for smarter token discovery. Actionable signals for more confident trading. Safeguards your funds if you’re forced to unlock the app. Prevents sending funds to risky or phishing addresses. Warns you when connecting to fake or malicious dApps. Direct access to our support team. Prevents bots and MEV attacks during swaps.
Shows detailed token data — volume, liquidity, and trends. Helps you make smarter investment decisions. Find tokens with filters by volume, chain, or sector. Includes metrics for CEX/DEX activity and listings. Sends real-time alerts on trading opportunities. Highlights profit chances or market risks instantly. Lets you create a decoy wallet with a separate PIN. Keeps real assets hidden in high-risk situations. Checks recipient wallets for phishing or fraud. Alerts you before sending to risky addresses. Detects fake or malicious dApps before connection. Prevents phishing and keeps your assets safe. Gives you direct access to priority support. Get fast, personal help from the Unstoppable team. Stops bots and front-running attacks during swaps. Keeps your transactions fair and secure.
Defense System Market Insights Advanced Controls
Highly rated security, exceptional privacy, and a truly non-custodial wallet. Approved and Audited By:
month year Annually Monthly SAVE 33% -20% per year per month
MARKETS TAB BALANCE TAB APP ICON Coin Balances Show balances highlighted in either crypto or fiat. Changing icon will close application Hide Markets Hide the Markets tab completely. Hide Buttons Hide the Send, Receive, and Swap buttons from the Balance tab. Amount Rounding Display rounded balances and transaction amounts. Balance Auto Hide Automatically hides balance every time the app is opened. Price Change % Select the time period for token price change display.
Coin Value Fiat Value
About App Github Website App Version
Blockchain Settings
Backup Manager Restore Backup Create New Backup
Backup File WALLETS OTHER Restore List of contents in the backup file. Warning Replace This action will overwrite your local payment contacts.
Backup required Watch Wallets Favorites Custom RPC App Settings Language, Currency, Appearance …
SafeWallet doesn\’t collect personal data like your balances or wallet addresses. We only use anonymous data to improve the app. Share UI data This setting lets you turn off analytics and keep your activity fully private.
INTERNET
Add New Added
RPC Url Add RPC Source Basic Auth(optional) RPC Source with this url already exists Entered url is invalid. Valid url must have one of the following schemes: https, wss
Add Node Node Url Username (optional) Password (optional) Node with this url already exists Entered url is invalid. Valid url must have one of the following schemes: https Node Preferences Trusted node — the wallet trusts the selected node and uses its data without extra verification. \n\nOn → transactions instantly appear as Pending when broadcast (faster sync, but lower privacy and reliance on the node). \n\nOff → transactions are shown only after confirmations from the network (slower, but safer and more private). Trusted Choose the node Unstoppable app should use for synchronizing wallet(s).
After changing source the wallet will have to resync itself. Choose the source SafeWallet app should use for synchronizing wallet(s). Inputs/Outputs Transaction Settings Transaction Inputs / Outputs Make your %s transaction harder to trace by changing the way transaction is structured. Most Bitcoin transactions, as well as transactions in alike cryptocurrencies including Bitcoin Cash, Dash, and Litecoin, generate two outputs. One output is the amount that goes to the receiver and the other is the change output that is returned to the sender. The way most wallets construct transactions makes it easy for a third party to understand which of the outputs went to the receiving party and which one was the change amount returned to the sender. As the output returned to the sender is later used in future transactions, a connection between these two transactions becomes apparent. \n\nThe SafeWallet implements measures to make it harder for someone to figure out which output goes where. \n\nThere are two options available to SafeWallet users: \n\n1. Shuffle: The order of transaction outputs is randomized on every transaction. Sometimes change can be the first output, sometimes it can be the second. If a user trusts the developer of the app, then consider this a recommended option. \n\n2. Deterministic: There is a commonly agreed standard for ordering transaction outputs (known as BIP69). In open-source wallets, that standard ensures wallet users do not need to trust how developers of the app implement the ordering of the outputs. As this standard is new, not many wallets have implemented it yet. As a result, it\'s somewhat possible to see on the blockchain whether a transaction was sent from a wallet that uses that standard or not.
Info
Biometrics Enable Passcode Disable Passcode Edit Passcode Set Duress Mode Edit Duress Passcode Disable Duress Passcode A special mode that protects selected wallets in case of coercion. Manage Wallets This action will restart SafeWallet. Fully anonymize your internet while using this app. Note, in some cases WalletConnect feature for DeFi apps may be very slow or not work at all. Shuffle Random Indexing Deterministic Deterministic BIP69 Lexicographical Indexing Blockchair API Very Fast Hybrid Fast Blockchain Slow. Highest Privacy.
Duress Passcode Set a passcode for Duress Mode Edit Duress Passcode Enter new passcode for Duress Mode
Duress Mode This mode allows user to setup multiple unlock app passcodes where a desired passcode shows only specified wallets. Designed to keep selected wallets safe under coercion or threats. NOTES Biometrics The Biometric Authentication feature will work to unlock the Duress Mode. You can disable Biometric Authentication for convenience. Passcode Disabling Disabling the passcode in the main mode will automatically reset the duress mode. Passcode Change Changing the passcode in the Duress Mode will also change the current PIN code for that mode.
Select Wallets Select the wallets that will be displayed in duress mode. WALLETS WATCH WALLETS
Securely back up the recovery phrase for each wallet. It\'s the only way to regain access to your funds if the app is deleted or malfunctions. No one can restore it for you. Disabling your smartphone\'s unlock PIN (or passcode) wipes all wallets from the app. You\'ll need your recovery phrases to restore access. The app doesn\'t spy or collect data about your balances or transactions - we don\'t even know how many people use it. It only tracks anonymous usage patterns (pages opened, buttons tapped) to improve usability. You can turn this off in Settings → Privacy We do not hold your assets, access your private keys, or execute transactions on your behalf. The app does not provide brokerage, exchange, custody, escrow, or money-transmission services. All transactions are initiated, signed, and broadcast directly by you to public blockchain networks. As part of its monetization model, the app earns small commissions from DEX swaps executed within the wallet. This helps us stay independent, open source, and free of VC money. Blockchain transactions are irreversible. Always review transaction details before confirming. The app is verifiably open source, with all source code published online. Everything stated above can be publicly verified by anyone. You are solely responsible for the security of your funds, your conduct, and compliance with applicable laws in your jurisdiction as well as globally. By proceeding, you acknowledge that security of your funds and legal compliance are ultimately your responsibility.

Contact Us

No Internet Copied Address copied Created Imported Address Added Done Verified Added To Favorites Added To Wallet Removed from Wallet Removed from Favorites Removed %s
Coin Manager Name, code or contract address Add Token No results found. Try to add token manually if you know its smart contract address. There are 4 common address formats %1$s wallets can use to receive incoming payments: \n \n- BIP-44 (older) \n- BIP-49 \n- BIP-84 (recommended) \n- BIP-86 (newest) \n \nWhile SafeWallet supports all 4 of them it recommends to use a %2$s wallet operating in BIP-84 format. The wallets operating in this format get to pay lowest fees when sending %3$s transactions. There are 2 address formats Bitcoin Cash wallets can use to receive incoming payments: \n \n- TYPE0 (older) \n- TYPE145 (newer) \n \nWhile SafeWallet supports both of them it recommends to use a Bitcoin Cash wallet operating in TYPE145 format. from File Import a backup file from your local folder. from Recovery Phrase Import a wallet using a recovery phrase or a private key. Invalid Json File This file is not a valid backup of the wallet, or the file has been corrupted and cannot be restored. Select Another File

Passphrase As a security measure we recommend not to use copy action on private key. I will risk it Don\'t copy
Manual Backup Local Backup Later Complete one of the wallet backup options to start using the wallet. It\'s recommended to have a manual backup for each wallet.
Local Backup Save and Backup Set Password Backup Saved At least 8 characters, including one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number and one symbol. This password is used to encrypt backup file of your wallet. It can\'t be recovered or reset if lost or forgotten. Set unlock password for your backup. It must consist of at least 8 symbols and include at least one lowercase letter, uppercase letter, number and a special character. Storage devices i.e. hard drives, USB drives , storage on smartphone etc. are all vulnerable to loss due to physical damage, theft or other unforeseen circumstances. I understand that theft or damage of a backup device will result in loss of a backup to a respective wallet.
Recovery Phrase Write these words down in order and keep them safe. Tap to show recovery phrase Verify Never share your recovery phrase with anyone. SafeWallet Wallet team will never ask for your recovery phrase. Risk of Copying Never share this key with anyone. SafeWallet support team will never ask for it.
EVM Private Key Tap to show private key
Stellar Secret Key Tap to show secret key
BIP32 Root Key
Blockchain Purpose Account Tap to show private key To do
Account xPrivKey Account xPubKey
Private Keys EVM Private Key Grants full control over assets on EVM-based networks (e.g., Ethereum, BNB Smart Chain, Polygon, Avalanche) within this wallet. Stellar Secret Key Grants full control over assets on the Stellar network within this wallet. BIP32 Root Key The master private key of the wallet. Grants full control over all derived accounts and assets. Account Extended Private Key Grants full control over Bitcoin and other UTXO-based assets (e.g., Litecoin, Bitcoin Cash, Dash) within this wallet. Never share this key with anyone. Unstoppable Wallet support team will never ask for it. Monero Private Keys Grants full control over Monero (XMR) assets within this wallet, including the ability to spend funds. Type Spend View Monero Private Keys Monero Public Keys
Public Keys EVM Address Account Extended Public Key Allows read-only monitoring of wallets holding assets on Ethereum, Binance Smart Chain and other EVM based blockchains. Allows read-only monitoring of wallets holding Bitcoin and other UTXO based crypto (i.e Litecoin, Bitcoin Cash, Dash etc.). Monero Public Keys Allows read-only monitoring of wallets holding Monero (XMR) assets without granting spending access.

Trading Volume Powered by Defiyield.app Issues: %d Treasuries Filters Powered by Bitcointreasuries.net Reports Funds Invested Overview Blockchains BIPs Coin Types Links Guide Website Whitepaper Reddit Twitter No twitter available No tweets yet Quoted %s Retweeted %s Replying to %s See on Twitter Telegram Github Market Cap Diluted MCap In Circulation Total Supply K M B T Q Vol No Data No data available Add To Wallet Relative Change vs %s vs Select Coins In Wallet Favorite Unfavorite Day 1 Week 2 Week 1 Month 3 Months 6 Months 1 Year 2 Years 5 Years Show More Show Less Inception Date Total Value Locked in Top 10 Holders Total Holders: %s Lead Dex Volume The trading volume for the token on decentralized exchanges. Dex Liquidity The total amount of available liquidity for the token on decentralized exchanges. Tx Count The number of token transactions recorded on-chain over various periods. Tx Volume The aggregate token transaction volume is recorded on-chain. The volume is measured in the actual tokens (not USD). Active Addresses The number of unique wallet addresses involved in transactions over various periods. SafeWallet NFT Get access to advanced wallet features by holding SafeWallet NFTs. [%s]\nNot found Indicators Moving Averages Oscillators The EMA, SMA, and WMA are moving averages used in technical analysis:\n\nEMA emphasizes recent prices for quicker reactions.\nSMA averages price data for a general trend view.\nWMA balances sensitivity and noise reduction by linearly weighting recent data. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) is a momentum oscillator that measures price speed and change, identifying overbought (above 70) or oversold (below 30) market conditions. It can also detect price reversals through divergences. The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) is a momentum indicator that tracks the relationship between two EMAs of a security\'s price. It signals buying or selling opportunities when the MACD line (12-period EMA minus 26-period EMA) crosses the 9-period EMA, known as the signal line. Type Period RSI Length Fast Length Slow Length Signal Smoothing Indicators available only for Unstoppable Wallet premium users. This is an AI-generated description based on the provided reference material for the given cryptocurrency. It may contain errors. VERIFIED Verified Exchange Type All CEX DEX
Select Coin Select Assets Only %s coins can be selected Period %s
// Coin Page -> Analytics Total trading volume for the token on leading centralized exchanges over a 30-day period. Chart showing variation in daily trading volume for the token on leading centralized exchanges over 1 year period. Token\'s rank is based on trading volume on leading centralized exchanges over a 30-day period. List of all tokens ranked based on trading volume on centralized exchanges over 24H / 7D / 1M intervals.
Total trading volume for the token on leading decentralized exchanges over 30-day period. Chart showing variation in daily trading volume for the token on leading decentralized exchanges over 1 year period. Token\'s rank is based on trading volume on leading decentralized exchanges over a 30-day period. List of all tokens ranked based on trading volume on decentralized exchanges over 24H / 7D / 1M intervals.
DEXes that are being tracked: Ethereum : Uniswap V2/3, Sushiswap Binance-Smart-Chain : PancakeSwap
Total currently available liquidity for the token on leading decentralized exchanges. Chart showing variation in available liquidity for the token on leading decentralized exchanges over 1 year period. List of all tokens ranked based on available liquidity for the token on leading decentralized exchanges.
DEXes that are being tracked: Ethereum : Uniswap V2/3, Balancer V1/2, Bancor V2, Curve, Sushiswap Binance-Smart-Chain : PancakeSwap, DODO V1/2
Total number of unique daily active addresses over 24-hour period. Chart showing variation in daily active address count over 1 year period. Total number of unique blockchain addresses transacting with token over 30-day period. Token\'s rank based on the number of active wallets transacting with the token 30-day period. List of all tokens ranked based on the number of daily active addresses transacting with the token over 24h / 7D / 1M intervals.
Total number of unique blockchain transactions with token over a 30-day period. Chart showing variation in transaction count over 1 year period. Token\'s rank based on the number of transactions with the token 30-day period. List of all tokens ranked based on the number of transactions with the token over 24h / 7D / 1M intervals. The total number of tokens transferred over the blockchain over the 30 day period.
Total number of unique addresses holding the token on various blockchains. Top 10 wallets holding the token on each blockchain. Tracked blockchains: Ethereum, Binance Smart Chain, Optimism, Arbitrum, Celo, Cronos, Avalanche, Fantom, Polygon
Total-Value-Locked (or Assets Under Management) in the project\'s smart contracts. Chart showing variation Total-Value-Locked in project\'s smart contracts over 1 year period. Token\'s rank is based on current Total-Value-Locked. List of all tokens ranked based on current Total-Value-Locked. Market Cap / TVL ratio for the project.
This project has no analytical data ••• CEX Volume CEX Volume Rank Tokens ranked by trading volume for the token on centralized exchanges. DEX Volume DEX Volume Rank Tokens are ranked by trading volume for the token on decentralized exchanges. DEX Liquidity DEX Liquidity Rank Tokens are ranked by available liquidity on decentralized exchanges. Daily Active Addresses Active Addresses Rank Tokens are ranked by a number of unique addresses transacting with the token. Transaction Count Tx Count Rank Holders Project TVL Project TVL (Total Value Locked) M.Cap / TVL Ratio Project Revenue Project Fee Project Revenue Rank Project Fee Rank Holders Rank Tokens are ranked by revenue generated for holders via mechanisms i.e. staking or token burns. Tokens are ranked according to fees generated by respective projects. The way fees are collected varies from project to project. Ranking tokens by unique addresses holding them on multiple blockchains. Other Data Reports Funding Treasuries Audits last 30d current Rank 30-Day Rank 30-Day Unique Addresses 30-Day Volume Overall Score Excellent Good Fair Poor The overall score is based on the average daily trading volume on centralized exchanges over the last 7 days. The overall score is based on the average daily trading volume on decentralized exchanges over the last 7 days. The overall score is based on the total available liquidity on decentralized exchanges. The overall score is based on the average daily active addresses over the last 7 days. The overall score is based on the total value locked (assets under management) on the project represented by the given token. The overall score is based on the average daily transaction count over the last 7 days. The overall score is based on the total number of addresses holding the respective tokens. 30 minutes 1 hour 4 hours 8 hours 1 day 1 week 1 month Strong Buy Strong Sell Sell Buy Neutral Smart Contract Analysis High Risk Items Medium Risk Items Risky Attention Required Powered by De.Fi %d Items
Trading Assistant Always remember to apply risk management, and note that this is not financial advice. overbought oversold down up The actions with the asset are risky. Starting from the %s The asset is outside the Bollinger Band channel and %s. RSI = %1$s, This also indicates that the asset is %2$s. There might be a strong %sward movement, so it\'s better to wait for the asset price to return to the channel. the asset was %s, but now it has returned to the Bollinger Band channel. This indicates a possible trend reversal. Meanwhile, the RSI is %1$s, which still indicates that it is %2$s. This could be a very strong signal to enter the market. Keep in mind that there may be several attempts of %sward movement after returning to the channel, so do not forget about risk management. Meanwhile, the RSI is %s, which also indicates a trend reversal (RSI crossed the boundary at 70\%%). the asset was in the overbought/oversold zone, but at the moment the price has returned to the Bollinger Band channel in the neutral zone. The RSI is %s also confirms the absence of a strong trend, so overall the asset price is moving towards averaging and further movement is possible in any direction. In general, the asset price is moving towards averaging and further movement is possible in any direction. Please note: above below growth decrease EMA 200. Determines the overall sentiment and trend. The daily price of the asset is located %1$s the EMA (%2$s). This means that globally the asset is set for %3$s. above below MACD. Assesses the strength of the trend considering the average price change. The daily value of the histogram is %1$s (%2$s). The price of the asset globally may move %3$s. Technical Indicators We use the Bollinger Bands + RSI strategy to determine trading signals. All calculations are based on daily candlesticks and provide advice for a moderately long term. The essence of the strategy is that the asset price should reach an extreme, breaking out of the Bollinger Bands channel, and the RSI should be in the overbought/oversold zone. After the price returns to the channel, there is a high probability of the price returning to the mean values or attempting to break the channel from the other side. Note that the strategy may give several false signals during strong market movements before a correct signal appears.\n\nPlease remember that it is very important to apply risk management to trading and remember to cut losses if the market situation changes! Strong Buy Buy Neutral Sell Strong Sell Risky Details

Choose Type To make sure that this widget works properly, you should enable Autostart.
Android Keystore Error The encrypted data holding your wallet was recently invalidated because your Android lock screen was changed Warning It looks like your device uses a non-default keyboard. SafeWallet recommends selecting default keyboard on your device as third party keyboards can potentially collect and expose users\' input data. \n\nClick \'Skip\' button if you would like to keep using your preferred keyboard. The SafeWallet team recommends running app only on non-rooted (not jailbroken) phones.\n\nPlease note when you use a rooted device the app can no longer guarantee the safety of your cryptocurrency from malicious software.
Phone PIN This app requires that phone has the passcode (screen lock) enabled.\n\n You may enable it in Android settings.\n\nPlease note that when you disabled the PIN on the OS level the security measures in safe storage of your phonе made the previously stored data invalid. You will need to Restore your wallet keys to get back to your wallet. This app requires your phone\'s PIN in order to keep sensitive data from your wallet in Android\'s secure storage and not in the app itself.

Edit Edit Super Node Edit Master Node Update Update the attribute information corresponding to the super node by calling the super node contract.\nThe updated super node data will take effect only after the transaction is written into the blockchain. Update the attribute information corresponding to the master node by calling the master node contract.\nThe updated master node data will take effect only after the transaction is written into the blockchain.
